scenarios.title: Multi-Agent RL Environments
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task mentions PettingZoo, AEC or Parallel multi-agent environments, action masks, environment families, custom PettingZoo envs, PettingZoo wrappers, or PettingZoo compliance tests.
scenarios.role: Guides agents through PettingZoo environment use, selection, authoring, validation, wrappers, and training-framework integration planning.
scenarios.read_when: PettingZoo, AECEnv, ParallelEnv, agent_iter, parallel_env, action_mask, api_test, parallel_api_test, pettingzoo[classic], pettingzoo[atari], Pistonball, Connect Four, Tic-Tac-Toe, custom multi-agent env, CleanRL/Tianshou/SB3/RLlib with PettingZoo.
scenarios.best_for: Writing correct AEC/Parallel loops, selecting optional environment-family extras, implementing custom environments, diagnosing compliance-test failures, composing wrappers/conversions, and adapting framework tutorials safely.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is only generic Gymnasium single-agent usage, general RL algorithm implementation without PettingZoo environments, or framework-specific training unrelated to PettingZoo adapters.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `pettingzoo` for PettingZoo-specific API contracts and repository-supported examples; choose a framework-specific skill only after this skill establishes the PettingZoo environment interface and optional dependencies.
